title: Suki Gifts 12131 Realistic Pomeranian Dwarf Pointed Cuddly Toy, Multi-Colour
features: Suki Classics are them most realistic animal creations at affordable prices in a true celebration of Nature's workmanship. Collect them all.
Soft caress plush toy with airbrushed details
Part of the classics lifelike animals collections
description: Product Description Premium quality soft boa plush dog with realistic features, soft fur and airbrushed details. Classics offer a broad collection of realistically styled animals, many of which are uniquely enhanced with air brushed features. Approximately 5 inches (12.7 cm) high. Suitable for all ages. Hand wash and air dry. Other sizes and friends also available in the classics range of sitting and lying cats, dogs and jungle animals. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Box Contains 1x Plush
